content.text: All 12 tests pass. Now create a CLI wrapper and GitHub Actions workflow.

input.content:
# CLI entrypoint for the secret rotation validator.
# Loads the module functions and invokes the validator with CLI args.
[CmdletBinding()]
param(
    [Parameter(Mandatory)][string]$ConfigPath,
    [int]$WarningDays = 7,
    [ValidateSet('markdown','json')][string]$Format = 'markdown',
    [string]$Now,
    [string]$OutputPath
)

. $PSScriptRoot/SecretRotationValidator.ps1

$nowDt = if ($Now) { [datetime]$Now } else { Get-Date }

$report = Invoke-SecretRotationValidator -ConfigPath $ConfigPath -WarningDays $WarningDays -Format $Format -Now $nowDt

if ($OutputPath) {
    $report | Set-Content -Path $OutputPath
}
$report

input.content:
name: Secret Rotation Validator

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      config_path:
        description: Path to secrets config JSON
        required: false
        default: fixtures/secrets.json
      warning_days:
        description: Warning window in days
        required: false
        default: "7"
      format:
        description: Output format (markdown|json)
        required: false
        default: markdown
      now:
        description: Override current date (yyyy-MM-dd) for deterministic runs
        required: false
        default: "2026-04-20"
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 9 * * 1"

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  CONFIG_PATH: ${{ github.event.inputs.config_path || 'fixtures/secrets.json' }}
  WARNING_DAYS: ${{ github.event.inputs.warning_days || '7' }}
  REPORT_FORMAT: ${{ github.event.inputs.format || 'markdown' }}
  NOW_OVERRIDE: ${{ github.event.inputs.now || '2026-04-20' }}

jobs:
  test:
    name: Run Pester tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run Pester
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $res = Invoke-Pester -Path ./SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1 -PassThru -Output Detailed
          if ($res.FailedCount -gt 0) { throw "Pester failed: $($res.FailedCount)" }

  validate:
    name: Generate rotation report
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run validator
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $report = ./Invoke-Validator.ps1 -ConfigPath $env:CONFIG_PATH -WarningDays ([int]$env:WARNING_DAYS) -Format $env:REPORT_FORMAT -Now $env:NOW_OVERRIDE
          Write-Host "===REPORT-START==="
          $report
          Write-Host "===REPORT-END==="

      config_path:
        description: Path to secrets config JSON

permissions:

env:

  WARNING_DAYS: ${{ github.event.inputs.warning_days || '7' }}
  REPORT_FORMAT: ${{ github.event.inputs.format || 'markdown' }}
  NOW_OVERRIDE: ${{ github.event.inputs.now || '2026-04-20' }}

jobs:
  test:

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

          if ($res.FailedCount -gt 0) { throw "Pester failed: $($res.FailedCount)" }

  validate:

      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run validator

        run: |

          $report

content.text: Let me rewrite the harness to match the spec: temp git repo + `act push --rm`.

content.content: The file /home/passp/repos/compare-agent-scripting-by-language/workspaces/2026-04-17_004319/18-secret-rotation-validator/powershell-tool-opus47-200k-medium/Test-Workflow.ps1 has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

lines: -# Test harness: runs the GitHub Actions workflow through `act` for each fixture
-# case and asserts the output matches the expected classification.
+# Test harness for the Secret Rotation Validator workflow.
-# Produces act-result.txt with appended output from each case.
+#   1. Set up a fresh temp git repo containing the project files and the case's
+#   2. Write a .env file with the case's WARNING_DAYS / REPORT_FORMAT / NOW_OVERRIDE.
+#   4. Capture output into act-result.txt and assert on exact expected strings.
+# Total `act push` runs: 3 (one per case — within the harness limit).
-# Use powershell-yaml if present, else a crude parse check
-# Each case: name, secrets, warningDays, now, expected substrings that MUST
-# appear in the report, and substrings that MUST NOT.
-    # Build act invocation. We drive workflow inputs via workflow_dispatch.
+        # Env overrides consumed by the workflow env: block defaults
-    # Use workflow_dispatch event for precise input control
+        # .actrc from parent (to use our pwsh image)
+        # Init a git repo so `act push` works
-    # Must have Job succeeded for both jobs
-    throw "One or more workflow test cases failed. See $actResult"
+    throw "One or more workflow cases failed. See $actResult"
+Write-Host "`nAll workflow cases passed. act output at $actResult"

All done. Summary:

- **`SecretRotationValidator.ps1`** — `Get-SecretRotationStatus`, `Format-RotationReport`, `Invoke-SecretRotationValidator` (markdown/JSON).
- **`SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1`** — 12 Pester tests, all passing (TDD: tests written first, then implementation).

- **`.github/workflows/secret-rotation-validator.yml`** — push/PR/schedule/workflow_dispatch triggers, actionlint-clean, two jobs (`test` → `validate`) with `shell: pwsh`.

- **`act-result.txt`** — 259 lines capturing act output for all 3 cases.
